raw_consumer_statement:
I have mentioned above that the first day that I received the card it already had a balance. 
I called home depot and explained to them that I received a new card with a balance already in it. I called home depot on XX/XX/XXXX spoke to three different people explaining the problem, but no one could tell me exactly what to do. In XXXX XXXX I received a letter that said " Thank you for your business as a Home Depot Consumer Credit card Holder, while we are investigating your billing dispute or fraud claim, we have adjusted the minimum payment due on your account. Then on XXXX XX/XX/XXXX I received a latter from CITI Bank that said " your Home depot consumer credit card account is still open, however your charging privileges may already be suspended or get suspended in the near future. 
Then I decided to wait and see what they were going to do, but as of the last time they did nothing but send me another card. This is why I decided to officially make my complaynt to cfpb.
